---
title: "Unity Runner"
filters:
  - unity-runner
---

## Check Connection

```{.unity title="Status"}
unity-cli status
```

## Enter Play Mode

```{.unity title="Play Mode"}
unity-cli editor play --wait
```

## Execute C# Inside Unity

```{.cs .unity title="Application Data Path"}
return Application.dataPath;
```

```{.cs .unity title="List Scene Objects"}
var objects = GameObject.FindObjectsOfType<GameObject>();
foreach (var obj in objects) Debug.Log(obj.name);
return objects.Length + " objects found";
```

## Console Logs

```{.unity title="Read Logs"}
unity-cli console --type error,warning,log
```

## Multi-Command Sequences

```{.unity title="Build & Run"}
echo "Starting build pipeline..."
unity-cli editor play --wait
unity-cli exec "Debug.Log(\"Build complete at \" + System.DateTime.Now);"
unity-cli console --type log
```
